# What to do When Assumptions Fail {#assumptions-fail}

```{r assumptions-fail-chapter-setup, include=FALSE}
source("../shared/setup.R")

knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  fig.path = "_main_files/figure-html/assumptions-fail-",
  cache.path = "../build/cache/book/assumptions-fail/"
)
```

```{r child-assumptions-fail, child="../lecture-content/07-assumptions-fail.Rmd"}
```
